Features
Fully local. 4K Resolution. Unlimited Rendering.
VFX Pass Generator
VFX Pass Generator
VFX Pass Generator
Convert your footage into a rotoscoped, relightable 3D asset
Learn More â
PBR, Alpha & Depth Map
Powered by
SwitchLight 3.0
, convert images and videos into
full PBR passes with alpha and depth maps
for seamless relighting, background removal, and advanced compositing.
Unlimited Local Rendering
Your files never leave your machine, and no cloud credits are used. Perfect for pros handling confidential or proprietary material.
4K Resolution up to 1 hour
Render 4K videos up 1 hour in full precision, all processed locally on your GPU.
Render Queue
Batch render multiple shots with a render queue. Your computer becomes a fully automated production engine.
Advanced Render Controls
Customize your renders with options like deflicker on/off to fine-tune your PBR results and achieve the exact PBR look you want.
Plugins for Blender, Unreal Engine, & Nuke
Send generated VFX passes directly into Blender, Unreal Engine or Nuke for dynamic relighting and compositing.
Flexible Input (EXR / PNG / MOV / MP4)
Import EXR, PNG, MOV or MP4 files for maximum compatibility with both professional VFX pipelines and standard video workflows.
Flexible Output (EXR / PNG / MP4)
Export your results in EXR, PNG or MP4, giving you full control across both professional VFX workflows and standard video delivery.
Beeble Editor
Beeble Editor
Beeble Editor
A fast, real-time 3D relighting editor
Learn More â
One Click VFX Asset Import
Load all generated assets instantly with a single click and start relighting right away.
Relight
Relight your footage with point lights, area lights, sunlight, video lights and HDRI environments.
Animated Lighting
Drive your lights dynamically with Video Light feature. Also you can control your lights with keyframe animation in classic way.
Blend Modes for Creative Lighting
Choose between normal, add, lighten and screen blend modes to relight completely or just add a new light on top of the original plate.
2D / 3D Viewport for Precision Editing
Edit your scene in 3D view for physically correct and intuitive control. Fine tune your results at the image level in 2D view.
Composite with Diverse Assets
Import GLTF models, Gaussian splats, HDRIs and background plates and composite them together with your VFX passes.
Control Your Pass Properties
Modify depth, material responses and color, then refine your alpha mask with erosion or feathering for a polished composite.
Full Camera Control
Adjust camera zoom, focal length and aspect ratio. Match the virtual camera precisely to your real shot for physically consistent results.
Beeble Studio Plans
